# Aura Knowledge

> Focused essays for humans, backed by compact agent-auditable research packets.

## Primary Pages
- [Home](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/)
- [Roadmap](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/roadmap/)
- [Agent Entry](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/)
- [Knowledge Graph](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/graph/)

## Articles
- [The Future of Publishing Is Agent-Auditable Research](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/agent-auditable-research/)
- [Agentic Commerce and the Product Truth Layer](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/articles/agentic-commerce-product-truth/)

- [ai-native-publishing topic JSON](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/topics/ai-native-publishing.json)
- [consumer-behavior topic JSON](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/topics/consumer-behavior.json)
- [digital-gardens topic JSON](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/topics/digital-gardens.json)
- [incumbent-adjacent-ventures topic JSON](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/topics/incumbent-adjacent-ventures.json)
- [open-protocols topic JSON](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/topics/open-protocols.json)
- [product-truth topic JSON](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/topics/product-truth.json)
- [research-workflows topic JSON](https://aura-knowledge.github.io/agents/topics/research-workflows.json)

## Use
Use article packets as the retrieval unit. Treat maturity values as uncertainty markers. Prefer claim IDs and source IDs over inferred citations. Article artifacts use schemaVersion 2; evidence and counterevidence are typed packets, not bare source IDs.
